description: A solid with atoms arranged in highly ordered structure; nature's geometry made visible. 'Kirae' names what earth grows perfect—the faceted form of ordered beauty.
sound_symbolism: The word cuts clear. 'Ki' defines with sharp facet, edges precise. 'Ra' refracts light in rainbows. Then 'e' opens to transparent depth.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo kirae' (crystals). A counted bounded crystal may take optional object classifier 'themo'. Names quartz, gems, any crystalline structure.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Clarity as crystal—the clear mind that sees without distortion.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Crystals held power—used for healing, divination, the earth's perfect geometry.
